What we offer
            your company

Corporate relocation

betterhomes is Dubai's leading relocation partner. We work directly with HR, mobility, and procurement teams to make housing transitions seamless for your incoming employees.

01

Dedicated relocation coordinator

One dedicated contact to guide you from first enquiry through to move-in.

02

Corporate lease agreements

Flexible lease options tailored to your company's relocation and mobility needs.

03

Bulk unit availability

Reserve multiple units across different layouts, ensuring your team is in the same building.

04

Private viewings

Exclusive tours and private presentations at a time that suits your schedule.

05

Continued support

Our corporate & relocation team will assist with each tenancy, from renewals to unit changes.

Exclusive offer

CORPORATE RELOCATION                  BENEFITS NOW AVAILABLE

Designed for qualifying bulk lease agreements, this limited-time opportunity gives companies more value when relocating their teams. Speak to our team to discuss eligibility and terms.

On qualifying bulk corporate lease agreements.

CITY TOWER
URBAN LIVING
City Tower brings a calmer pace to urban living in one of Dubai’s most desirable locations – Sheikh Zayed Road.
The striking 93-story building offers 695 stunning residences, ranging from spacious studios to four-bedroom penthouses. City Tower’s hospitality-driven services and unparalleled amenities create a truly distinctive living experience.
Designed for residents with fast-paced lifestyles, City Tower’s vertical neighborhood offers unmatched convenience, giving back precious hours each week.
REIMAGINED
A home for those who value city proximity and effortless routines, where time is life’s most precious asset.
Urban living, reimagined for professionals
